HomePage.title: Car Rental & Marketplace
HomePage.description: Book or list your car easily

register.title: Biggest car rental platform in Egypt
register.subtitle: Create your account to start your journey with us
register.terms: I agree to the Terms & Conditions and Privacy Policy

validation.userNameMin: Name must be at least 3 characters
validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters

login.title: Discover the road with safety and ease
login.description: Whether you're planning a leisure trip or a business trip, we offer you a wide range of new and reliable cars with competitive prices in the heart of Cairo.
login.subtitle: Login to manage your account and bookings

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we will send you a reset link
forgotPassword.description: Recover your account securely and continue your journey with Rento without any hassle.
forgotPassword.securityDescription: We ensure a secure account recovery process to keep your personal information and account protected.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address

verifyEmail.title: Welcome to the future of car rentals in Egypt
verifyEmail.description: We are committed to providing you with a hassle-free and secure experience. Please verify your account to start your journey with us.
verifyEmail.subtitle: Enjoy a safe holiday, manage your account, and continue your journey with Rento.

validation.otpNumbers: Verification code must contain numbers only

resetPassword.title: Your safety and comfort on every trip
resetPassword.subtitle: Create a new strong password for your account
resetPassword.description: We are here to help you recover your account quickly and easily. Set a strong password to ensure the security of your personal information and account.
resetPassword.encryptionDescription: Your data is protected with modern security standards.
resetPassword.speedDescription: Your password is updated instantly across your account.
resetPassword.requirementUpperLower: At least one uppercase and one lowercase letter

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.passwordUppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
validation.passwordLowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
